_meta.status: DRAFT — for review. Not wired into extraction yet (slice 2).
_meta.purpose: Canonical amateur competition pathways. Drives the series: tag in tag_manager (slice 2) and the iOS Series filter. Slice 1 already ships the 'detect: tag' pathways (NSEA/Pony Club/BSPS) via their existing affiliation: tags.

axes.series: named pathway (NSEA, Trailblazers, Cricklands...) — what to aim for
axes.level: elite | affiliated | bs-club | unaffiliated | schools | youth — how serious
axes.stage: qualifier | championship | league | season-series — orthogonal stepping-stone flag, NOT a series

rules: detect=tag → already tagged in the data, expose as-is (no parsing).
detect=name → match keywords on the event NAME; anchor on the distinctive literal token.
exclude_keywords → if any present, do NOT match (kills venue/format false positives).
source_hint → tag every event from this source (name often lacks the brand).

CLASS-LEVEL: series/qualifier signals often live in the class list, not the event title (e.g. an event named 'Unaffiliated Show Jumping' with 'Class 8: Trailblazers Qualifier'). Detect from competitions.classes (now stored), not just the name.
_meta.counts: from the live prod data scan, 2026-06-29

nsea.note: Name-only would miss ~77% (only 22/97 say 'NSEA') — MUST use the tag.

trailblazers.note: Clean distinctive token; also has its own source for name-less rows.

cricklands.note: Cricklands is a CHAMPIONSHIP grassroots venues run qualifiers for (e.g. NVEC 'inc Cricklands qualifiers'). South View (49) is a different VENUE — exclude it.

bs-club.note: Literal 'BS Club' only — a loose club+showjumping regex explodes to 1106 false hits.

sunshine-tour-uk.note: Same name as the ELITE Spanish CSI Sunshine Tour — disambiguate: must say 'Qualifier', must NOT say 'CSI'.

brc.note: Do NOT match bare 'riding club' (240 hits, only ~65 real BRC). Deferred until anchored rules are verified.

stage_flags._note: Orthogonal stepping-stone markers, layered onto a series — NOT series themselves. 'Qualifier within 50mi' alone already surfaces 'things to aim for'.

qualifier.note: Cleanest flag in the data (name+tag agree on 391).

class_series._note: BS class series live in the CLASS list, not the event title (e.g. 'Class 8: Trailblazers Qualifier', 'Junior Foxhunter'). Detect from competitions.classes; many double as qualifiers — pair with stage_flags.qualifier. Match 'junior/senior foxhunter' before bare 'foxhunter'.

junior-foxhunter.note: a specific aim for junior riders

blacklist._note: Never treat these as a series — venue names or class formats.
blacklist.south-view: venue that hosts Cricklands, not the series
blacklist.pyo: 'Pick Your Own' is a class format (646 hits), not a pathway

absent_needs_sources._note: Wanted, but barely present until grassroots sources are added (e.g. the 63 Equus Organiser venues).
